# CWE-338 safe: Use of Cryptographically Weak Pseudo-Random Number Generator (PRNG) (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-338-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/rand"
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/hex"
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func MintAccessToken(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	buf := make([]byte, 32)
	if _, err := io.ReadFull(rand.Reader, buf); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	token := hex.EncodeToString(buf)
	user := r.URL.Query().Get("user")
	_, err := db.Exec("UPDATE sessions SET token = ? WHERE user = ?", token, user)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return err
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	return nil
}
